---

___________
*One of the northernmost critical risk locations that sees seasonal cycles. The Guild has left imposing obelisks in the foothills to warn travelers of the danger present. 
Large, windswept flatlands with ephemeral low-level growth are all that can withstand the tumultuous weather. 
The wetter rainfall against drier, mild climates make the quiet days immensely pleasant.
Between the transitions of spring to summer and summer to fall, encountering a megastorm is a practical guarantee. Depending on the time, the [[Locations/Yavapai Desert\|Yavapai Desert]] region may be a wiser route.

**![](data:image/png;base64,)________________________________
